name.en: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology of India
name.zh: 印度电子和信息技术部

description.en: MeitY is the Indian government ministry responsible for IT policy, electronics manufacturing (including PLI scheme), digital governance, and cybersecurity. It publishes data on electronics production, exports, and digital infrastructure.
description.zh: 印度电子和信息技术部是负责IT政策、电子制造（包括PLI计划）、数字治理和网络安全的印度政府部门。发布电子产品生产、出口和数字基础设施数据。
